title: PAW - Napkins 3-Ply (33 x 33 cm) I 20 Pieces I Perfect for Birthdays, Parties, Weddings, Communion and Celebrations I Paper Napkins Colorful - Nature, Leaves: Exotic Leaves
features: Napkin made of 3-layer silk Paper with a weight of 16 g/m², FSC and Ecolabel-certified, manufactured in Europe
Dimensions 33 x 33 cm, pack contents 20 pieces. The napkins are printed with environmentally friendly water-based inks.

The product has a certificate issued by the Institute for National Health that shows that our products can come into contact with food and are environmentally friendly and meet the requirements of BFR XXXVI.
The napkins are printed with environmentally friendly colors on a water-based inks.
Napkins ideal for everyday use and for special occasions such as birthdays, name days, garden festivals, family celebrations, parties with friends
description: From the manufacturer Wild and colorful paper napkins are an excellent choice for various occasions A pattern with trendy, exotic leaves is an excellent choice for any occasion. The modern composition combines a strong linear drawing of feathers and golden and black leaves. The limited color palette of the napkins makes them perfect to combine with other golden patterns. Atmospheric table decoration in colorful color palettes for different occasions Napkins made of 3-ply tissue paper with a weight of 16 g/m², made in Europe. Dimensions 33 x 33 cm, package contents 20 pieces. The napkins are printed with water-based paints. The Institute of National Health agreed the product, proving that our products may come into contact with food and meet the requirements of BFR XXXVI.
